decisions.decision: HRV (resonant) is the source of truth; the Navi flow mirrors it
decisions.rationale: Operator directive for the consistency pass

decisions.decision: Countdown beep (scheduleCountdownTick) and the Navi per-OM tick (scheduleNKTick) are SEPARATE functions with separate constants
decisions.rationale: Semantically distinct — a change to one must not affect the other

decisions.decision: The end chord (scheduleEndChord) is a SINGLE shared function used by both HRV and Navi completion
decisions.rationale: It is the same practice-ending sound; a change should apply to both

decisions.decision: Countdown duration stays 3s (LEAD_IN_DURATION_SEC / LEAD_IN_TICK_INTERVAL_SEC in audioEngine.ts)
decisions.rationale: Operator explicitly said 'do not change' after asking about the timing

decisions.decision: Navi natural completion shows an inline 'Session complete' headline (no popup), cleared on practice switch
decisions.rationale: HRV parity — HRV uses an inline SessionReadout headline

next_action: Wait for the operator's Navi running-session feedback, then fix/change behavior in the window between the countdown ending and end-session. Read src/hooks/useNKEngine.ts and the Navi handlers + running render in src/app/App.tsx first.
context_notes: This session was a UAT-driven consistency pass on the already-implemented Phase 31 — not plan execution. All 5 changes are committed to main (c19c0e1..d2bdcaf); working tree clean; 1124 tests pass; tsc + eslint clean (1 pre-existing react-refresh warning in App.tsx). Next work is scoped strictly to the Navi RUNNING session (countdown-end through end-session) — the useNKEngine engine behavior and the running-state render. The countdown flow, the Cancel path, the end-session confirmation dialog, the completion handling, and all of HRV are considered settled this session — do not rework them unless the operator's feedback explicitly calls for it. Verify after every change: `npx tsc -b --force`, `npx eslint <files>`, `npx vitest run` (must stay at 1124 passing). Commits go directly to main, conventional-commit style, scope (31).
